tier: Tier 2 (supplementary) + Tier 3 (archived specimens, marked with current_location)

primary_written_source.citation: Csere, Csaba. "1987 Porsche 959 Archived Test." Car and Driver, November 1987.
primary_written_source.chicago_bibliography: Csere, Csaba. "1987 Porsche 959 Archived Test." Car and Driver, November 1987.
primary_written_source.notes: 0-60 in 3.6 sec, 190 mph. Csere wrote 'perfect is difficult to avoid.'

artifact_types.period-artifact: Contemporaneous artifact from the primary source era.
artifact_types.specimen-photograph: Modern photograph of the original vehicle.

image_primary_sources.creator: Porsche AG (factory press image)
image_primary_sources.license: Fair use, educational — manufacturer press photograph
image_primary_sources.description: Porsche's factory press image of the 'Gruppe B' concept car at the 1983 Frankfurt IAA motor show — the official reveal of the 959's exterior design, four years before Csaba Csere's 1987 road test.
image_primary_sources.chicago_caption: Porsche AG, *Porsche 'Gruppe B' Concept at 1983 Frankfurt IAA*, 1983, factory press photograph via StuttCars, https://www.stuttcars.com/porsche-959-gruppe-b/.
image_primary_sources.chicago_bibliography: Porsche AG. *Porsche 'Gruppe B' Concept at 1983 Frankfurt IAA*. Factory press photograph. 1983. Via StuttCars. https://www.stuttcars.com/porsche-959-gruppe-b/.
image_primary_sources.chicago_footnote_short: Porsche AG, *'Gruppe B' Concept at 1983 Frankfurt IAA*.

image_primary_sources.creator: Porsche AG (factory press image)
image_primary_sources.license: Fair use, educational — manufacturer press photograph
image_primary_sources.description: Alternate factory press image of the 959 Gruppe B concept showing the Rothmans livery testbed configuration that previewed the Paris-Dakar rally car.
image_primary_sources.chicago_caption: Porsche AG, *Porsche 959 'Gruppe B' Concept, Rothmans Livery*, 1983, factory press photograph via StuttCars, https://www.stuttcars.com/porsche-959-gruppe-b/.
image_primary_sources.chicago_bibliography: Porsche AG. *Porsche 959 'Gruppe B' Concept, Rothmans Livery*. Factory press photograph. 1983. Via StuttCars. https://www.stuttcars.com/porsche-959-gruppe-b/.
image_primary_sources.chicago_footnote_short: Porsche AG, *Porsche 959 'Gruppe B' Concept, Rothmans Livery*.

image_primary_sources.creator: leduardo
image_primary_sources.description: The Porsche 'Gruppe B' concept shown at the 1983 Frankfurt Motor Show — the direct precursor to the production 959 and the first public sighting of the shape Csaba Csere would test four years later.
image_primary_sources.chicago_caption: leduardo, *Porsche 959 Concept Car Gruppe B 1983*, 2007, Wikimedia Commons, CC BY 2.0, https://commons.wikimedia.org/wiki/File:Porsche_959_Concept_Car_Gruppe_B_1983.jpg.
image_primary_sources.chicago_bibliography: leduardo. *Porsche 959 Concept Car Gruppe B 1983*. Photograph. 2007. Wikimedia Commons. CC BY 2.0. https://commons.wikimedia.org/wiki/File:Porsche_959_Concept_Car_Gruppe_B_1983.jpg.

image_primary_sources.creator: leduardo
image_primary_sources.description: Rear view of the 1983 Gruppe B concept showing the integrated rear wing and air intakes that survived onto the production 959.
image_primary_sources.chicago_caption: leduardo, *Porsche 959 Concept Car Gruppe B 1983 (rear)*, 2007, Wikimedia Commons, CC BY 2.0, https://commons.wikimedia.org/wiki/File:Porsche_959_Concept_Car_Gruppe_B_1983_(rear).jpg.
image_primary_sources.chicago_bibliography: leduardo. *Porsche 959 Concept Car Gruppe B 1983 (rear)*. Photograph. 2007. Wikimedia Commons. CC BY 2.0. https://commons.wikimedia.org/wiki/File:Porsche_959_Concept_Car_Gruppe_B_1983_(rear).jpg.

image_primary_sources.wikimedia_title: File:Hamburg Prototyp Porsche 959 Prototype Group B.jpg
image_primary_sources.creator: Ad Meskens
image_primary_sources.description: The Group B 959 prototype on display at the Prototyp Museum in Hamburg.
image_primary_sources.chicago_caption: Ad Meskens, *Porsche 959 Prototype Group B at Hamburg Prototyp Museum*, 2024, Wikimedia Commons, CC BY-SA 4.0, https://commons.wikimedia.org/wiki/File:Hamburg_Prototyp_Porsche_959_Prototype_Group_B.jpg.
image_primary_sources.chicago_bibliography: Meskens, Ad. *Porsche 959 Prototype Group B at Hamburg Prototyp Museum*. Photograph. 2024. Wikimedia Commons. CC BY-SA 4.0. https://commons.wikimedia.org/wiki/File:Hamburg_Prototyp_Porsche_959_Prototype_Group_B.jpg.

image_primary_sources.creator: MrWalkr
image_primary_sources.description: A 1985 Porsche 959 prototype — the model year in which Porsche completed pre-production development that culminated in Csaba Csere's 1987 road test.
image_primary_sources.chicago_caption: MrWalkr, *1985 Porsche 959 Prototype*, 2024, Wikimedia Commons, CC BY-SA 4.0, https://commons.wikimedia.org/wiki/File:1985_Porsche_959_Prototype_SP24.jpg.
image_primary_sources.chicago_bibliography: MrWalkr. *1985 Porsche 959 Prototype*. Photograph. 2024. Wikimedia Commons. CC BY-SA 4.0. https://commons.wikimedia.org/wiki/File:1985_Porsche_959_Prototype_SP24.jpg.

image_primary_sources.wikimedia_title: File:959 mecanical sketch in Stuttgart museum.jpg
image_primary_sources.creator: Rouk40130
image_primary_sources.description: Factory mechanical sketch of the 959 on display at the Porsche Museum in Stuttgart, showing the PSK all-wheel-drive layout and twin-turbo flat-six.
image_primary_sources.chicago_caption: Rouk40130, *Porsche 959 Mechanical Sketch at Stuttgart Museum*, 2024, Wikimedia Commons, CC BY 4.0, https://commons.wikimedia.org/wiki/File:959_mecanical_sketch_in_Stuttgart_museum.jpg.
image_primary_sources.chicago_bibliography: Rouk40130. *Porsche 959 Mechanical Sketch at Stuttgart Museum*. Photograph. 2024. Wikimedia Commons. CC BY 4.0. https://commons.wikimedia.org/wiki/File:959_mecanical_sketch_in_Stuttgart_museum.jpg.

image_primary_sources.creator: Sfoskett
image_primary_sources.description: The Porsche 959's water-cooled twin-sequential-turbo 2.85-liter flat-six engine — the unit Csere described as delivering near-perfect throttle response in his 1987 road test.
image_primary_sources.chicago_caption: Sfoskett, *Porsche 959 Engine*, 2005, Wikimedia Commons, CC BY-SA 3.0, https://commons.wikimedia.org/wiki/File:Porsche_959_engine.jpg.
image_primary_sources.chicago_bibliography: Sfoskett. *Porsche 959 Engine*. Photograph. 2005. Wikimedia Commons. CC BY-SA 3.0. https://commons.wikimedia.org/wiki/File:Porsche_959_engine.jpg.

image_primary_sources.creator: Uncredited (Ralph Lauren Car Collection)
image_primary_sources.description: Ralph Lauren's 1988 Porsche 959 Komfort — one of the private American owners who, along with Bill Gates and Paul Allen, triggered the fight to legalize 959 imports into the United States.
image_primary_sources.chicago_caption: Uncredited, *1988 Porsche 959 Komfort, Ralph Lauren Collection*, Wikimedia Commons, CC BY-SA 3.0, https://commons.wikimedia.org/wiki/File:Porsche_959_34_left.jpg.
image_primary_sources.chicago_bibliography: Uncredited. *1988 Porsche 959 Komfort, Ralph Lauren Collection*. Photograph. Wikimedia Commons. CC BY-SA 3.0. https://commons.wikimedia.org/wiki/File:Porsche_959_34_left.jpg.
image_primary_sources.chicago_footnote_short: Uncredited, *1988 Porsche 959 Komfort, Ralph Lauren Collection*.

image_primary_sources.creator: Uncredited (Ralph Lauren Car Collection)
image_primary_sources.description: Interior of Ralph Lauren's 959 — the cabin Csere tested, contrasting the car's everyday-Porsche ergonomics with its Group B supercar pedigree.
image_primary_sources.chicago_caption: Uncredited, *1988 Porsche 959 Interior, Ralph Lauren Collection*, Wikimedia Commons, CC BY-SA 3.0, https://commons.wikimedia.org/wiki/File:Porsche_959_interior.jpg.
image_primary_sources.chicago_bibliography: Uncredited. *1988 Porsche 959 Interior, Ralph Lauren Collection*. Photograph. Wikimedia Commons. CC BY-SA 3.0. https://commons.wikimedia.org/wiki/File:Porsche_959_interior.jpg.
image_primary_sources.chicago_footnote_short: Uncredited, *1988 Porsche 959 Interior, Ralph Lauren Collection*.

image_primary_sources.wikimedia_title: File:Porsche 959 1986 Paris Dakar Racer Rothmann Racing LFrontSide PorscheM 9June2013.jpg
image_primary_sources.creator: Valder137
image_primary_sources.description: The Rothmans-liveried 959 that won the 1986 Paris-Dakar Rally — the motorsport halo period Csere cited in his 1987 test as evidence that the car was 'perfect' for its time.
image_primary_sources.chicago_caption: Valder137, *Porsche 959 1986 Paris-Dakar Rothmans Racer*, 2013, Wikimedia Commons, CC BY 2.0, https://commons.wikimedia.org/wiki/File:Porsche_959_1986_Paris_Dakar_Racer_Rothmann_Racing_LFrontSide_PorscheM_9June2013_(14989626056).jpg.
image_primary_sources.chicago_bibliography: Valder137. *Porsche 959 1986 Paris-Dakar Rothmans Racer*. Photograph. 2013. Wikimedia Commons. CC BY 2.0. https://commons.wikimedia.org/wiki/File:Porsche_959_1986_Paris_Dakar_Racer_Rothmann_Racing_LFrontSide_PorscheM_9June2013_(14989626056).jpg.

image_primary_sources.wikimedia_title: File:Porsche 961 (1987 24 Hours of Le Mans, No.203) in the Porsche-Museum (2009).jpg
image_primary_sources.creator: Alexander Migl
image_primary_sources.description: The Porsche 961 — the Le Mans race variant of the 959 — in the colors it ran at the 1987 24 Hours of Le Mans, in the Porsche Museum.
image_primary_sources.chicago_caption: Alexander Migl, *Porsche 961 (1987 Le Mans No. 203) in the Porsche Museum*, 2020, Wikimedia Commons, CC BY-SA 4.0, https://commons.wikimedia.org/wiki/File:Porsche_961_(1987_24_Hours_of_Le_Mans,_No.203)_in_the_Porsche-Museum_(2009)_IMG_2761.jpg.
image_primary_sources.chicago_bibliography: Migl, Alexander. *Porsche 961 (1987 Le Mans No. 203) in the Porsche Museum*. Photograph. 2020. Wikimedia Commons. CC BY-SA 4.0. https://commons.wikimedia.org/wiki/File:Porsche_961_(1987_24_Hours_of_Le_Mans,_No.203)_in_the_Porsche-Museum_(2009)_IMG_2761.jpg.
